zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh De Pyne於1183年出生在英國戴文韋斯特 唐時，他的父親William De Pyne I24歲，母親Juliana of Bradwell20歲。他與Juliana of Bradwell結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1230年在英國英格蘭戴文韋斯特 唐享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Pine  . This name has been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Pine
meanings: English: from Middle English pin(e) (Old English pīn, Old French pin), a topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous pine tree or in a pine forest; in some cases it may originally have been a nickname for a tall man, one thought to resemble a pine tree.
English: nickname from Middle English pine ‘pain, injury, torture, punishment, infirmity’, referring to someone who suffered from an inflicted pain or punishment.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Pin in Calvados or some other French place called from a prominent pine.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh De Pyne was born in 1183, in West Down, Devon, England, his father, William De Pyne I, was 24 and his mother, Juliana of Bradwell, was 20. He married Juliana of Bradwell. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1230, in West Down, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh De Pyne est né en 1183, à West Down, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William De Pyne I, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Juliana of Bradwell, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Juliana of Bradwell. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1230, à West Down, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh De Pyneが1183年にイギリスデボンウエスト ダウンで生まれた時，父William De Pyne Iは24歳，母Juliana of Bradwellは20歳であった。Juliana of Bradwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1230年にイギリスイギリスデボンウエスト ダウンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh De Pyne(이)가 1183년 영국 데폰 웨스트 다운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Pyne I(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana of Bradwell(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Juliana of Bradwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 웨스트 다운에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh De Pyne родился в 1183 г. в местности вест доун, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Pyne I было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana of Bradwell, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana of Bradwell. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1230 г. в местности вест доун, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.
